fields.name: Document Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of assembly document that the assembly order header represents in assemble-to-order scenarios.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the assembly order header that the assembly order line refers to.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the assembly order line is of type Item or Resource.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the assembly component.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies the second description of the assembly component.

fields.name: Lead-Time Offset
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lead-time offset that is defined for the assembly component on the assembly BOM.

fields.name: Resource Usage Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies how the cost of the resource on the assembly order line is allocated to the assembly item.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location from which you want to post consumption of the assembly component.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the bin where assembly components must be placed prior to assembly and from where they are posted as consumed.

fields.name: Appl.-to Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied to.

fields.name: Appl.-from Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied from.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the assembly component are expected to be consumed.

fields.name: Remaining Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the component are required on the assembly order line.

fields.name: Consumed Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the assembly component have been posted as consumed during the assembly.

fields.name: Quantity to Consume
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the assembly component you want to post as consumed when you post the assembly order.

fields.name: Reserved Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the assembly component have been reserved for this assembly order line.

fields.name: Reserved Qty. (Base)
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many assembly components have been reserved for this assembly order line. The components are in the base unit of measure.

fields.name: Avail. Warning
fields.tooltip: Specifies Yes if the assembly component is not available in the quantity and on the due date of the assembly order line.

fields.name: Substitution Available
fields.tooltip: Specifies if a substitute is available for the item on the assembly order line.

fields.name: Due Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date when the assembly component must be available for consumption by the assembly order.

fields.name: Reserve
fields.tooltip: Specifies the reserve option for the assembly order line.

fields.name: Quantity per
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the assembly component are required to assemble one assembly item.

fields.name: Qty. per Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity per unit of measure of the component item on the assembly order line.

fields.name: Inventory Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies links between business transactions made for the item and an inventory account in the general ledger, to group amounts for that item type.

fields.name: Gen. Bus. Posting Group
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the General Business Posting Group that applies to the entry.

fields.name: Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Cost Amount
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of the assembly order line.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Pick Qty.
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the assembly component are currently on warehouse pick lines.

fields.name: Qty. Picked
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the assembly component have been moved or picked for the assembly order line.
